stemHtml: A cold-air drop, also known as a cold pool, is characterized as…

options.a: The area to the rear of a warm front where freezing rain can be expected.
options.b: The area just behind a cold front, where freezing rain can be expected.
options.c: A thermal cold high-pressure system in the winter time, above contents.
options.d: A region of relatively cold air aloft, surrounded by warmer air.
